summary: iter208 testing complete: ML Forecast + Lifecycle Audit + LLM Unifier Regression. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: 4/5 features verified (80%). BEO offline queue partially tested due to transient network issues.

integration_issues.issue: Could not fully test offline queue functionality due to transient network/module loading errors. beo-sync-now and beo-pending-count elements not visible when online (expected - they appear only when offline changes are queued)

action_items: BEO offline queue: beo-sync-now and beo-pending-count elements are correctly hidden when online. Main agent should verify they appear when offline changes are queued.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth required for tested endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter208 features verified: (1) ML Forecast endpoint with model=ml returns proper structure with 8 stage probabilities, trailing_6mo_avg, and month objects with weighted_value, smoothed_value, confidence bands. (2) ML-meta endpoint returns model='single-exponential-smoothing', window_months=6, stage_probabilities dict, and trailing_6mo_realized list. (3) Lifecycle Audit returns summary with ok/warn/broken/total counts and rows list. (4) LLM unifier regression tests passed - analyze-event, whats-new, echo/chat all return expected responses. (5) BEO finalize regression passed. Frontend: CRM Lifecycle Audit tab shows summary cards, filter pills, rows, and refresh button. Forecast tab shows ML meta panel with stage probability chips and realized sparkline. BEO Builder shows ONLINE pill and draft picker. Events tab OpsBoard shows events with Echo Viewer drawer working.
